🔩 Trauma FixationREF: MRL-TRA-003

Auric LPS Tibia Locking Plates

Auric · Locking Plates

Complete range of tibial plates for proximal and distal tibia fractures with Bionik Gold Surface technology. Features medial, lateral, posterolateral, and posteromedial configurations.

MaterialTitanium with TiNb coating
WhatsApp Quote
Frequently Asked Questions

Complete range of tibial plates for proximal and distal tibia fractures with Bionik Gold Surface technology. Features medial, lateral, posterolateral, and posteromedial configurations.

This product is manufactured by Meril Life Sciences and is distributed by Agile Healthcare across all districts of Telangana.

Yes, all Meril Life Sciences products distributed by Agile Healthcare, including the Auric LPS Tibia Locking Plates, strictly adhere to CDSCO guidelines and ISO 13485:2016 quality standards.

The Auric LPS Tibia Locking Plates is constructed using Titanium with TiNb coating, ensuring high biocompatibility and durability.
